title: E2E Orchestrator + Deterministic Test Dimensions
description: Build the E2E test orchestrator (run-e2e.sh) with shared library and 5 deterministic test dimension scripts covering init, server, schema, multiplatform, and benchmarks.

dod.criterion: run-e2e.sh runs all dimensions and produces summary table + JSON results

tasks.title: Build run-e2e.sh orchestrator with --dim flag and shared library
tasks.scope: Create tests/e2e/run-e2e.sh and tests/e2e/lib/utils.sh with assert helpers, timing, port allocation, temp dir management, JSON result output.

dod.criterion: run-e2e.sh accepts --dim <name> to run single dimension or no args for all
lib/utils.sh provides assert_eq, assert_contains, assert_file_exists, assert_json_field, log_pass, log_fail, find_free_port, create_test_dir, cleanup_test_dir
Each dimension writes JSON to tests/e2e/results/dim-{name}.json
Final summary table printed with per-dimension pass/fail and total time

tasks.title: Dimension 1: Fresh Install & Init (3 Presets)
tasks.scope: tests/e2e/dim-init.sh — scaffold 3 presets in temp dirs, verify all files, agent counts, cross-references, symlinks.

dod.criterion: All 3 presets tested in isolated temp directories
Agent count validation: starter=5, standard=8, full=12 (including CEO)
Every agentFile in registry exists as non-empty file
Platform symlink and context tree verified

tasks.title: Dimension 2: Server Startup & Dashboard
tasks.scope: tests/e2e/dim-server.sh — start server on dynamic port, verify /api/health, /api/state, WebSocket, dashboard HTML.

dod.criterion: Server starts on dynamically allocated port
/api/health returns JSON with status=ok
Dashboard HTML served at / contains root div
Server cleaned up via trap EXIT

tasks.title: Dimension 4: Directive JSON Schema Validation
tasks.scope: tests/e2e/dim-schema.sh — validate directive.json and expected-outcomes.json schemas across fixture directives.

dod.criterion: All 5 fixture directive.json files pass structural validation
Synthetic invalid directive correctly caught
expected-outcomes.json schema validated

tasks.title: Dimension 6: Multi-Platform Init (4 Variants)
tasks.scope: tests/e2e/dim-multiplatform.sh — init with aider/gemini-cli/codex/other, verify correct directory structures and symlinks.

dod.criterion: All 4 platform variants tested
Platform-specific dirs created as symlinks to .gruai/
'other' creates only .gruai/

tasks.title: Dimension 7: Benchmark Timing Harness
tasks.scope: tests/e2e/dim-benchmark.sh — time init per preset, server cold-start, type-check. Output timing table + JSON.

dod.criterion: Init timed for all 3 presets
Server cold-start time measured
JSON output with operation, duration_ms, status
